system.description:
Discipline: Qinggong
Skill: Athletics TN 7
Type: Counter
Qi: 2

You retreat quickly against a vertical surface evading your opponent’s Attack, holding a horizontal stance that defies physics, your body parallel with the ground. You deliver a counter Attack from this position. To perform this Technique there must be a wall or similar object for you to retreat to (a tree, post or other vertical surface will work). It can be used whenever someone attacks you. Make an Athletics roll against TN 7. On a Success you evade your opponent’s Attack and can make an immediate mundane Attack. Cathartic: As above except you can deliver a mundane Attack or Kung Fu Technique. Bridge the gap with Leap of the Swan.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.requirementNotes: To perform this Technique there must be a wall or similar object for you to retreat to (a tree, post or other vertical surface will work).
